module_description: Monitors SSL/TLS certificate expiry for configured hostnames. Alerts when a certificate is due to expire within the configured warning period.

hints.enabled: Enable or disable SSL certificate monitoring for this entry.
hints.threads: Number of certificates to check in parallel.
hints.warning_days: Number of days before expiry to trigger a warning. Per-item value overrides the module-level default.
hints.timeout: Connection timeout in seconds. Per-item value overrides the module-level default.
hints.host: Address to connect to for certificate retrieval (the host's address).
hints.server_name: FQDN sent as SNI and validated against the certificate. Leave empty to use the host address. Useful for a reverse proxy that serves a different certificate per FQDN on the same address.
hints.port: HTTPS port. Leave empty (0) to use the standard port 443.
hints.verify: Validate the certificate chain and that it matches the server name. Disable to allow self-signed/untrusted certificates and only check expiry.

rename_item_prompt: Enter new host name or identifier:
